mapper.select:
SELECT u.loginID AS loginID, u.user_type AS userType, u.name AS name, u.phone AS phone, u.email AS email, u.birthday AS birthday, u.zipcode AS zipcode, u.addr1 AS addr1, u.addr2 AS addr2, u.img_name AS imgName, u.img_logi_path AS imgLogiPath, u.img_phy_path AS imgPhyPath,
r.resume_id AS resumeId, r.name AS resumeName,
u.chk_tem_password AS chk_Tem_Password
FROM tb_userinfo u LEFT JOIN resume r ON u.loginID = r.loginID WHERE u.loginID = #{loginID} ORDER BY r.resume_id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT c.course_id AS courseId, c.title AS title, IFNULL(inst.name, '') AS instructorName, IFNULL(cc.class_name, '') AS className, DATE_FORMAT(c.start_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS startDate, DATE_FORMAT(c.end_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS endDate, TIME_FORMAT(ct.start_time, '%H:%i') AS startTime, TIME_FORMAT(ct.end_time, '%H:%i') AS endTime FROM student_course sc INNER JOIN course c ON sc.course_id = c.course_id LEFT JOIN tb_userinfo inst ON c.professor = inst.loginID LEFT JOIN course_class cc ON c.class_id = cc.class_id LEFT JOIN course_time ct ON c.time_code = ct.time_code WHERE sc.loginID = #{loginID} AND c.course_isDeleted = 0 ORDER BY c.start_date DESC, c.course_id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO resume ( loginID, name, logical_path, physical_path, extends, size, create_at ) VALUES ( #{loginID}, #{name}, #{logicalPath}, #{physicalPath}, #{extend}, #{size}, NOW() )
mapper.select:
SELECT c.course_id AS courseId, c.title AS courseName, sc.stu_cou_sta_code AS courseStatusCode, cs.name AS courseStatusName, student_table.studentScore, student_table.myAvgScore
FROM student_course sc JOIN course c ON sc.course_id = c.course_id LEFT JOIN student_course_status cs ON sc.stu_cou_sta_code = cs.stu_cou_sta_code
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT td.course_id, SUM( CASE WHEN sta.student_answer = td.answer THEN td.score ELSE 0 END ) AS studentScore, SUM( CASE WHEN sta.student_answer = td.answer THEN td.score ELSE 0 END ) AS myAvgScore FROM test_detail td LEFT JOIN student_test_answer sta ON sta.course_id = td.course_id AND sta.period = td.period AND sta.question_no = td.question_no AND sta.loginID = #{loginID} GROUP BY td.course_id ) student_table ON student_table.course_id = sc.course_id
WHERE sc.loginID = #{loginID} ORDER BY c.start_date DESC

SELECT td.period AS period, SUM(td.score) AS totalScore, SUM(CASE WHEN sta.student_answer = td.answer THEN td.score ELSE 0 END) AS studentScore FROM test_detail td LEFT JOIN student_test_answer sta ON sta.course_id = td.course_id AND sta.period = td.period AND sta.question_no = td.question_no AND sta.loginID = #{loginID} WHERE td.course_id = #{courseId} GROUP BY td.period ORDER BY td.period ASC;
SELECT resume_id AS resumeId, loginID, name, logical_path AS logicalPath, physical_path AS physicalPath, extends, size FROM resume WHERE loginID = #{loginID} ORDER BY resume_id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT resume_id AS resumeId, loginID, name, logical_path AS logicalPath, physical_path AS physicalPath, extends, size FROM resume WHERE resume_id = #{resumeId}
